# Bug: forge:init / forge:update should guide users to gitignore .forge/store/events/

> Bug ID: FORGE-BUG-010
> Severity: minor
> Status: ✅ fixed
> Reported: 2026-04-17
> Resolved: 2026-04-17

## Description

Issue #47 — .forge/store/events/ accumulates transient JSON event logs that should not be in version control. Forge should add the path to .gitignore during /forge:init and surface a Step 5 audit item in /forge:update if the path is unignored.
